kirundi.win_battleship_in_30_shots_or_fewer: Tsinda Battleship mu masasu 30 cyangwa make
kirundi.colored_regions_are_the_four_quadrants: 🗺 Uduce dufite amabara ni uduce 4. Hindura inita y'icyerekezo hepfo kugira ngo urebe uko inyura.
kirundi.animate_walk_from_origin_to_this_point: Erekana inzira kuva ku nkomoko kugeza kuri iyi nita
kirundi.every_point_on_the_plane_has_exactly_t: Buri nita ku rwego ifite imibare ibiri rwose.
kirundi.the_first_is_the_x_coordinate_how_far_: Iya mbere ni igipimo x (intera y'urutambike kuva ku nkomoko: iburyo +, ibumoso −). Iya kabiri ni igipimo y (intera y'uruhagarike: hejuru +, hasi −).
kirundi.3_2_is_not_the_same_point_as_2_3_the_f: (3, 2) si inita imwe na (2, 3). Umubare wa mbere uhora ufatanya na x, uwa kabiri uhora na y. Kugira ngo wibuke: mu nyuguti «x iza mbere».
kirundi.q_i_both_positive_top_right_q_ii_x_is_: Q I byombi nziza (hejuru iburyo). Q II x mbi (hejuru ibumoso). Q III byombi mbi (hasi ibumoso). Q IV y mbi (hasi iburyo). Imibare y'Abaroma izenguruka inyuranye n'isaha kuva hejuru iburyo.
kirundi.across_the_x_axis_y_flips_across_the_y: Kunyura ku murongo x: y irahinduka. Kunyura ku murongo y: x irahinduka. Kunyura ku nkomoko: byombi birahinduka. Ni impinduka yoroshye cyane muri geometrie y'ibipimo.
kirundi.columns_files_are_letters_a_h_rows_ran: Inkingi ni inyuguti a-h. Imirongo ni imibare 1-8. Buri kazu gafite igipimo cy'inyuguti+umubare. Umwamikazi w'umweru atangirira kuri d1, umwami w'umukara kuri e8.
kirundi.type_a_chess_square_like_e4: Andika akazu ka chess nka e4
kirundi.practice_mode_translate_squares_to_not: 🎯 Uburyo bwo kwitoza — hindura utuzu mu bimenyetso
kirundi.type_the_chess_notation_for_the_highli: Andika ikimenyetso cya chess cy'akazu kagaragajwe
kirundi.alternates_two_directions_see_the_squa: Ihindagurika icyerekezo kibiri: reba akazu uhe izina, umve izina ushake. 5 zikurikiranye zitsinda ikimenyetso ♟️ Inararibonye ya Chess.
kirundi.chess_notation_works_because_it_pairs_: 💡 Ikimenyetso cya chess gikora kuko gifatanya gahunda y'imibare imwe (inyuguti nk'ahantu) n'indi (imibare nk'ahantu). «Izina» ry'akazu ni igipimo cyako, gusa cyanditswe ukundi kuruta (5, 4).
kirundi.i_will_hide_4_ships_sizes_4_3_3_2_on_a: Nzahisha amato 4 (ingano 4, 3, 3, 2) ku rusobe rwa 10×10. Inyuguti A-J mu bugari, imibare 1-10 hasi. Hamagara ibipimo kugira ngo uyabone. Amato yose yarohamye = watsinze.
kirundi.call_coordinates_to_find_the_ships: Hamagara ibipimo kugira ngo ubone amato.
kirundi.click_any_cell_to_fire_hit_miss_a_ship: Kanda akazu ako ari ko kose kugira ngo urase. 💥 = byagezweho, · = byabuze. Ubwato burohama iyo utuzu twabwo twose tugezweho.
kirundi.type_a_battleship_coordinate_like_b5_t: Andika igipimo cya Battleship nka B5, hanyuma ukande Enter kugira ngo urase
kirundi.or_tab_through_cells_and_press_enter: cyangwa koresha Tab unyure mu tuzu maze ukande Enter
kirundi.naval_coordinates_work_the_same_way_as: Ibipimo by'ingabo z'amazi bikora kimwe n'ibipimo by'imibare. Inyuguti + umubare = inita ku rusobe.
kirundi.lat_tells_you_how_far_north_south_of_t: Uburebure bukubwira intera y'amajyaruguru/amajyepfo ya ekwateri (0° kugeza 90°, amajyaruguru nziza, amajyepfo mbi). Uburambe bukubwira intera y'iburasirazuba/iburengerazuba bwa meridiyani nkuru (−180° kugeza 180°). Buri hantu ku Isi hafite imibare ibiri.
kirundi.practice_mode_find_the_place_from_its_: 🎯 Uburyo bwo kwitoza — shaka ahantu uhereye ku bipimo byaho
kirundi.click_on_the_map_above_within_15_of_th: Kanda ikarita iri hejuru. Muri 15° y'intego biharurwa nk'ukuri.
kirundi.trains_spatial_reasoning_lat_lon_to_a_: Itoza gutekereza ku mwanya: kuva ku burebure/uburambe kugeza ku mwanya ku mubumbe. 5 z'ukuri zitsinda ikimenyetso 🌍 Inzobere mu Bumenyi bw'Isi.
kirundi.every_lat_lon_pair_is_a_coordinate_jus: 💡 Buri nyabibiri (uburebure, uburambe) ni igipimo nka (x, y), gusa ku rugero rw'umubumbe. Uburebure mbi = amajyepfo, uburambe mbi = iburengerazuba. GPS, amakarita y'ikirere, kuyobora amato — byose igitekerezo kimwe.
kirundi.why_these_are_all_coordinate_planes: 💡 Kuki ibi byose ari urwego rw'ibipimo
kirundi.the_file_letter_a_h_is_column_1_8_the_: Inyuguti y'inkingi a-h ni inkingi 1-8. Umubare w'umurongo ni umurongo 1-8. e4 = (5, 4) hasi.
kirundi.identical_structure_to_chess_letter_fo: Imiterere imwe na chess. Inyuguti ku nkingi, umubare ku murongo. B5 = (2, 5).
kirundi.latitude_longitude_degrees_north_south: Uburebure + uburambe: dogere z'amajyaruguru/amajyepfo + dogere z'iburasirazuba/iburengerazuba.
kirundi.same_two_number_pair_idea_scaled_to_a_: Igitekerezo kimwe cy'inyabibiri y'imibare ibiri, cyagejejwe ku mupira. Portland, Maine iri kuri (43.66°N, 70.26°W). GPS, ikirere, kuyobora amato: byose ibipimo.
kirundi.every_grid_system_in_the_world_is_a_fi: Buri gahunda y'urusobe ku isi ni inyabibiri (umubare wa mbere, umubare wa kabiri). Igihe umunyeshuri abonye ko ikimenyetso cya chess na (x, y) ari kimwe, urusobe rwa aljebra ntirukomeza kumvikana nk'ikidasanzwe.
kirundi.reset_all_points_lines_and_quadrant_to: Subiza inita zose, imirongo, n'urugendo rw'uduce
kirundi.fill_in_rise_y_run_x_then_slope_m_rise: Uzuza kuzamuka (Δy), kwiruka (Δx), hanyuma iserêre (m = kuzamuka/kwiruka)
kirundi.d_x_x_y_y_round_to_1_decimal_place: 💡 d = √((x₂−x₁)² + (y₂−y₁)²)  — Uzunguruke ku mwanya 1 w'ibice icumi
kirundi.try_2x_1_linear_slope_2_x_3_negative_s: Gerageza: 2x+1 (umurongo, iserêre 2), -x+3 (iserêre mbi, y-intercept 3), x^2 (parabola), 0.5x-2 (iserêre ry'igice). Koresha ^ ku mbarakuru.
kirundi.sliders_for_x_and_y_widget_tells_you_w: Sliders za x na y. Widget ikubwira akarere kihariye urimo. Nta manota, nta gukura ku ibanga.
kirundi.hypothesis_what_sign_combinations_defi: Igitekerezo: Ni irihe huriro ry'ibimenyetso risobanura buri kadu?
kirundi.place_a_point_in_each_quadrant_look_at: Shyira inita muri buri kadu. Reba ibimenyetso.
kirundi.what_happens_exactly_on_an_axis: Ni iki nyirizina kibera ku murongo?
kirundi.explain_the_sign_pattern_that_defines_: Sobanura uburyo bw'ikimenyetso busobanura buri kadu.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_7_state_region_ma: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cy'akarere kihariye gifite imimerere 7; nta manota y'ibipimo; nta gukura ku ibanga — ku bushake.
kirundi.c_connect_mode_r_clear_ai_tutor: ⌨️ C: uburyo bwo guhuza | R: siba | ?: umwarimu wa AI
